headline: Nasdaq, NYSE to Ring Bell From Oval Office, Tout Trump Accounts
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Officials from the Nasdaq and the New York Stock Exchange plan to ring the opening bell from the Oval Office to mark the launch of Trump Accounts for minors, top White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett announced. headline: Why Is Axon Stock Surging On Monday?

headline: Jensen Huang’s Net Worth Under Pressure As Nvidia Stock Nears Bear Market
summary: Nvidia stock has pulled back from its May peak and is gradually approaching bear market territory. The shares have fallen nearly 20% from their year-to-date high, erasing billions of dollars from Jensen Huang’s fortune and inflicting losses on investors. Jensen...

headline: AMD (AMD) Commits £2 Billion to the UK and Helps Build Two AI Supercomputers at Cambridge
summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is one of the best fast growth stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 8, Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.’s (NASDAQ:AMD) Chair and CEO, Dr. Lisa Su, announced the company’s commitment to invest up to £2 billion over the next five years in the United Kingdom. headline: Trump Bought Up To $5 Million In Axon Stock Weeks Before ICE Sought $220 Million Taser Contract: Report
summary: Trump bought up to $5 million in Axon stock weeks before ICE sought a $220 million Taser contract, raising scrutiny, report says.
